SELECT from_base64(encoded_string) AS decoded_string FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded_string IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE decode_test AS SELECT from_base64(encoded_string) AS decoded FROM test_base64;
SELECT d.decoded, LENGTH(d.decoded) FROM decode_test d WHERE LENGTH(d.decoded) > 0;
WITH cte AS (SELECT 'QWdl' AS b64 UNION ALL SELECT 'SGVsbG8gR29vZCBNb3JuaW5n' UNION ALL SELECT 'VGVzdCBzdHJpbmc=' ) SELECT from_base64(b64) FROM cte;
SELECT t.encoded_string, from_base64(t.encoded_string) AS decoded FROM (SELECT 'U29tZSB0ZXh0' AS encoded_string) AS t;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test AS SELECT a.encoded_string, b.extra_info FROM (SELECT 'V29ybGQ=' AS encoded_string) AS a JOIN (SELECT 'info1' AS extra_info) AS b ON a.encoded_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.encoded_string, from_base64(a.encoded_string) AS decoded_value, COUNT(*) FROM multi_table_test a GROUP BY a.encoded_string;
